company.name: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals
company.subtitle: Rezdiffra $958M Y1 · First & only MASH drug · 36K+ patients · 10+ pipeline programs
company.cashRunway: Approaching profitability ($989M cash + $500M credit + accelerating Rezdiffra revenue)

market.notes: Rezdiffra 2025: $958M (Q4: $321M, $1.28B annualized). 36,250+ patients on therapy. First & only FDA+EC approved MASH drug. 94% gross margin equivalent (COGS $4.5M/qtr). >90% of target population still untreated. Patent protection to 2045. Oral once-daily, liver-directed THR-β agonist.

us.patientsK.note: Madrigal 10-K 2024 + AASLD: ~14M US MASH (F2-F3 fibrosis); ~6M biopsy-confirmed/FibroScan-qualified treatment-eligible.

eu.patientsK.note: EASL 2023: ~10M EU MASH F2-F3; ~4M eligible post Rezdiffra/Wegovy MASH label expansion.

row.patientsK.note: Global MASH ~115M F2-F3; treated pool ex-US/EU ~15M (Japan NHI early mover, China growing).

us.wtpPct.note: ~45% -- Medicare/commercial cover Rezdiffra (resmetirom, Madrigal) post-MAESTRO-NASH; prior-auth requires F2-F3 confirmation.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~30% -- EMA approved resmetirom 2024; HTA negotiation ongoing G-BA/NICE through 2025.

row.wtpPct.note: ~10% -- Japan PMDA approved 2024; emerging MASH access minimal near-term.

us.priceK.note: $47K/yr anchored to Madrigal Rezdiffra WAC 2024; GLP-1 adjacent (Wegovy MASH-expanded) ~$16K.

eu.priceK.note: EU net ~$25K Rezdiffra post AMNOG/NICE; GLP-1 ~$8K.

row.priceK.note: $12K blended -- Japan NHI Rezdiffra ~$20K, emerging tiered.

penPct.note: ~8% peak -- capacity + diagnosis bottleneck (FibroScan access) limits uptake despite large pool.

us.reachPct.note: Rezdiffra MASH F2/F3 approved Mar-2024 (first MASH therapy); ~600K US F2/F3 pts diagnosed; ~12% reach by 2026 as dx infra ramps; 2024 sales $180M launch, 2025A $1.28B.

us.priceK.note: ~$47K/yr WAC; ~$32K net after commercial rebates (~30% GTN) + 340B.

us.wtpPct.note: 50% -- commercial + Medicare Part D covered w/ PA requiring fibrosis evidence (FibroScan/MRE); MASH dx still nascent in primary care.

eu.reachPct.note: 5% -- EMA filing 2025; launch 2026; HTA bodies awaiting MAESTRO outcomes OLE.

eu.wtpPct.note: 20% -- NICE/G-BA cautious on MASH prevalence + budget impact; expect managed entry.

row.reachPct.note: 2% -- Japan NASH interest; Korea/APAC partnerships TBD.

market.notes: 2-year F4c data presented at EASL Congress 2025 — compelling results. Outcomes study in F4c ongoing — first-to-market outcomes data. F4c label expansion would significantly expand addressable population. F4 patients have highest unmet need.

us.patientsK.note: Madrigal 10-K 2024 + AASLD: ~14M US MASH (F2-F3 fibrosis); ~6M biopsy-confirmed/FibroScan-qualified treatment-eligible.

eu.patientsK.note: EASL 2023: ~10M EU MASH F2-F3; ~4M eligible post Rezdiffra/Wegovy MASH label expansion.

row.patientsK.note: Global MASH ~115M F2-F3; treated pool ex-US/EU ~15M (Japan NHI early mover, China growing).

us.wtpPct.note: ~45% -- Medicare/commercial cover Rezdiffra (resmetirom, Madrigal) post-MAESTRO-NASH; prior-auth requires F2-F3 confirmation.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~30% -- EMA approved resmetirom 2024; HTA negotiation ongoing G-BA/NICE through 2025.

row.wtpPct.note: ~10% -- Japan PMDA approved 2024; emerging MASH access minimal near-term.

us.priceK.note: $47K/yr anchored to Madrigal Rezdiffra WAC 2024; GLP-1 adjacent (Wegovy MASH-expanded) ~$16K.

eu.priceK.note: EU net ~$25K Rezdiffra post AMNOG/NICE; GLP-1 ~$8K.

row.priceK.note: $12K blended -- Japan NHI Rezdiffra ~$20K, emerging tiered.

penPct.note: ~8% peak -- capacity + diagnosis bottleneck (FibroScan access) limits uptake despite large pool.

us.reachPct.note: Rezdiffra F4c compensated cirrhosis label expansion pending MAESTRO-NASH OLE + outcomes; 15% peak reach in F4 pts 2027+.

us.wtpPct.note: 45% -- PA hurdles higher for F4; payors require transplant-free survival data.

market.notes: MGL-2086 (oral GLP-1, orforglipron derivative): clinic Q2 2026. Ervogastat (DGAT-2 inhibitor, licensed from Pfizer): Phase 2 combo trial planned. 6 preclinical siRNA programs: IND-enabling 2026. Strategy: Rezdiffra as foundation + combo partners for enhanced efficacy across MASH spectrum.

us.reachPct.note: Rezdiffra + GLP-1 combo (semaglutide/tirzepatide) or FGF21 combos; 2028+; 20% peak reach as payors accept stacked MASH therapy.

us.wtpPct.note: 40% -- combinatorial pricing risk; payors will step-edit + require head-to-head fibrosis endpoint data.

mega_bear.narrative: Rezdiffra growth stalls + GLP-1s cannibalize MASH market + F4c data disappoint
events: ✗ GLP-1 weight loss drugs (Zepbound, Wegovy) shown to resolve MASH
✗ Rezdiffra revenue plateaus at ~$1.5B as payers restrict
✗ F4c outcomes study mixed — no label expansion
→ Single-product company in shrinking addressable market

bear.narrative: Rezdiffra grows to $2-3B but GLP-1 competition limits long-term peak
events: ✓ Rezdiffra reaches $2-3B but GLP-1 combinations preferred in obese MASH
~ F4c label expansion granted but incremental
✗ Combo pipeline slow — Rezdiffra + GLP-1 trials take years
→ Peak $3B — $12B market cap at 4x peak, limited upside

base.narrative: Rezdiffra $5B+ peak — MASH standard of care + F4c expansion + combo pipeline building
events: ✓ Rezdiffra continues strong uptake — $2B+ in 2026, $5B+ peak
✓ F4c outcomes data positive — label expansion
✓ Rezdiffra + GLP-1 combo enters clinic — enhanced efficacy
✓ MASH market grows as awareness + diagnosis increase

bull.narrative: MASH franchise leader — Rezdiffra foundation + combos = $8B+ franchise
events: ✓ Rezdiffra $7B+ peak — dominant across F2-F4 MASH
✓ Rezdiffra + GLP-1 combo best-in-class — standard of care
✓ F4c + combo = addressable market 3x larger than current label
✓ Madrigal becomes the Vertex of liver disease

psychedelic_bull.narrative: MASH becomes the next statin market — Rezdiffra foundation of $15B+ franchise — Lilly/Roche acquires
events: ✓ MASH recognized as cardiovascular risk factor — screening mandated
✓ Rezdiffra + combos treat full MASH spectrum (F1-F4) — $10B+ franchise
✓ MASH addressable population expands from 3M to 15M+ in US alone
✓ Eli Lilly or Roche acquires Madrigal for $25-35B to own MASH market

lastData.title: $958M 2025 revenue (Y1), 36K+ patients, 10+ pipeline programs
points: Ervogastat DGAT-2 (Pfizer license): Phase 2 combo planned
F4c outcomes study ongoing — first-to-market outcomes data
EU approval received — EU launch preparing

nextCatalyst.title: Revenue trajectory + MGL-2086 GLP-1 clinic entry + F4c data updates
thresholds: Ervogastat Phase 2 combo trial design + FDA alignment

risks: $12.2B market cap at 12.7x 2025 revenue — premium valuation
GLP-1 drugs (tirzepatide, semaglutide) showing MASH benefit — competitive risk
Rezdiffra approved via accelerated pathway — confirmatory outcomes study needed
MASH diagnosis rates still low — requires education + screening infrastructure
F4c (cirrhosis) population excluded from current label — safety not established
Competition: Akero/AZD7687, Viking NASH, 89bio — several Phase 2/3 programs
Combo pipeline (GLP-1, DGAT-2) very early — years from contribution
Rezdiffra is first MASH drug but not necessarily the last or best

catalysts.title: MGL-2086 GLP-1 combination therapy Phase 1 start
catalysts._rationale: Company stated MGL-2086 expected to enter clinic in second quarter 2026

catalysts.title: Rezdiffra F4 cirrhosis label expansion data
siRNA program IND-enabling activities initiation
catalysts._rationale: Company announced IND-enabling activities for siRNA candidates will begin in 2026
